personal.name: Karol Naze
personal.title: Software Engineer | AI | Automation
personal.bio: Hey 👋 I’m Karol — Software Engineer specialized in AI and backend systems. I studied in Morocco (INSA Euro-Méd) then in Paris (École Denis Diderot, Paris Cité University), where I graduated Top 2 of my class and delivered the valedictorian speech in 2024. I build LLM-powered applications, agentic pipelines, and APIs that go from prototype to production. Available immediately for Data & AI roles.

education.institution: Collège Saint Jean Baptiste de la Salle – Ouagadougou
achievements: Graduated with distinction (Mention Bien)

education.institution: INSA Euro-Méditerranée (7th INSA in France) — Université Euro-Méditerranéenne de Fès, Morocco
achievements: Scholarship obtained through a competitive entrance exam organized by the Euro-Mediterranean University of Fez
Rigorous two-year preparatory program in Mathematics and Computer Science

education.institution: École d’Ingénieur Denis Diderot — Paris Cité University
achievements: Graduated with honors (Top 2 of the class)
Valedictorian speaker — delivered the graduation speech on behalf of the class
Broad engineering curriculum: Algorithms & Data Structures, Machine Learning, AI, Cybersecurity, Web & Mobile Development
Final year specialization: Embedded Systems & IoT
Graduation project: Generative AI chatbot with OCR-based document extraction (Python, LangChain)
Presented AI project at the university tech fair 2024

experience.description: Design and development of commercializable AI accelerators for the consulting firm and its clients. Operated as an AI-Powered Fullstack Engineer — from architecture to production delivery. Delivered multiple production-grade GenAI systems within 5 months.
impact: Market Intelligence — autonomous AI agent for strategic web monitoring and executive briefings (Gemini Deep Research, LangGraph)
AO Crawler — real-time tender detection pipeline with NLP analysis and automated alerting
Eko (Devoteam Global AI Hackathon) — agentic knowledge capitalisation suite; technical lead; 3rd worldwide — Jury Award & People Award

experience.description: Launched as micro-entrepreneur after CGI internship to deepen AI expertise and explore an entrepreneurial path across Europe and Africa. Delivered diverse projects spanning mobile apps, multimodal AI pipelines, and web development.
impact: SegMe — mobile reservation app (Planity-style) for the West African market, deployed on App Store & Google Play. Fullstack contribution: React Native, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe
Multimodal extraction engine — text and image extraction pipeline for unstructured documents (GPT-4o Vision, FastAPI, LangChain, FAISS, Azure)
Custom web projects — showcase and corporate sites, web apps (React, Next.js), SEO optimization, Shopify e-commerce integrations

experience.description: Joined CGI's Paris Energies Utilities & Communications (PEUCS) business unit at La Défense, Puteaux. Worked as AI Engineer Consultant on two GenAI MVPs for EDF — during the early boom of generative AI (GPT-3.5 era).
impact: Designed and developed a RAG chatbot on EDF's regulatory corpus — architecture vectorielle, recontextualisation des requêtes (LangChain, ChromaDB, Azure OpenAI GPT-3.5)
Integrated an OCR pipeline (PyTorch + TensorFlow) achieving 94% recognition rate on 200+ documents
Requirements gathering with EDF domain experts and sprint reviews delivery

experience.description: Typsa Digital Solutions (TDS), Madrid, Spain — led the migration of a critical business tool from a fragmented Excel/VBA ecosystem to a centralized, performant and scalable web architecture.
impact: Migrated VBA statistical calculation engines to Python (NumPy) — eliminated Excel dependency and automated analyses
SQL query optimization and Django algorithm refactor — processing latency cut by nearly half (-40%)
Built React dashboard and Node.js data ingestion service

experience.description: Private mathematics tutoring for secondary and preparatory class students in Paris.
impact: Adapted teaching methods to individual student profiles

experience.description: Reception and guest services at major European trade fairs in Paris (International Agriculture Show, Paris Motor Show, etc.).
impact: Professional client-facing experience in high-traffic event environments
Team coordination during large-scale international exhibitions

experience.description: First internship in France, Créteil — refactored internal Java tool for banking analysts under Elie Chemali, Data Architect.
impact: Java tool refactor with Clean Code principles
UX/UI redesign following best practices; discovered IHM design
Strengthened Java programming and software craftsmanship

projects.title: AIPortfolio
projects.description: Revolutionary AI-powered portfolio system: edit a single JSON file to get a complete interactive portfolio with an intelligent chatbot. Built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. Features modern design, dynamic project showcases, and zero code required for updates.

projects.title: Infrastructure Optimization Assistant
projects.description: A modular AI-powered application designed to analyze infrastructure monitoring data, detect technical anomalies (e.g., high CPU usage, latency spikes), and generate actionable optimization recommendations using GPT-4o. Built for SMEs to improve system performance and resilience.

images.alt: Live visualization of infrastructure anomalies and AI-generated recommendations
API endpoint handling data ingestion and anomaly detection

achievements: Modular multi-node architecture for ingestion, detection, and LLM-based recommendation.
Realtime analysis pipeline using FastAPI and async/await for LLM calls.
Structured separation of concerns via independent business logic modules.
Interactive frontend dashboard for uploading JSON, visualizing metrics, and receiving AI recommendations.
Robust error handling and fallback logic implemented in API endpoints.
Fully testable backend modules with unit test structure ready for pytest.

projects.title: AI Chatbot Assistant
projects.description: Query Bot is an AI-powered application that allows users to interact with multiple PDF documents using natural language. It leverages language models and semantic search to answer questions based on the actual content of uploaded PDFs.

images.alt: PDF text extraction and chunking process

achievements: Built a full-stack PDF chatbot using Streamlit and OpenAI GPT.
Extracted and chunked text from multiple PDFs for semantic processing.
Integrated vector search with FAISS for contextual retrieval.
Enabled natural language interaction with document content.
Used LangChain to manage prompt templates and memory.
Deployed locally with Streamlit CLI and .env-based key management.

projects.title: Full-Self Driving System Simulation
projects.description: Developed a 2D autonomous driving system in a simulated environment using the synchronous language Heptagon and C integration. The vehicle navigates a virtual city while respecting speed limits, traffic lights, and avoiding obstacles. Visualization handled via SDL2, with debugging and performance analysis tools integrated.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects.description: Tic Tac Toe is an interactive web app built with React. It allows two players to compete in a classic game of tic-tac-toe, with a simple, responsive, and user-friendly interface.

projects.title: Smart Training Advisor
projects.description: An intelligent training recommendation system powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). It analyzes employee skill assessments, detects competency gaps, and generates personalized training plans using GPT-4. Designed for HR teams seeking automated, insightful, and scalable workforce development strategies.

projects.title: Intelligent Document Analysis
projects.description: An advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that analyzes complex documents containing text, images, tables, and charts. Powered by LangChain, Unstructured, and GPT-4 Vision, it extracts and interprets multimodal data to answer user queries through a sleek Streamlit interface.

projects.title: AstroControl
projects.description: AstroControl is a space robotics supervision system designed to control and monitor autonomous robots through a centralized dashboard. Built with Java, Spring, and PostgreSQL, it enables real-time mission creation, monitoring, and simulation. A RESTful API facilitates integration and robot communication, while unit testing ensures system robustness. This scalable solution supports mission simulation, alerts, and robot telemetry in a secure, modular architecture.

projects.title: Protecto-Cycle
projects.description: Protecto-Cycle is a smart lighting system for bicycles that automates headlights and turn signals based on rider movements and surroundings. It uses motion detection and directional input to control front lights, brake lights, and blinkers for enhanced road safety. Designed with Arduino and Raspberry Pi, it merges energy efficiency with real-time responsiveness.

projects.title: Eliza Chatbot
projects.description: A Lisp implementation of the classic Eliza chatbot, simulating a psychotherapist through pattern-matching rules and scripted dialogue. Inspired by the original 1966 MIT project, this version mimics conversational exchanges using symbolic AI techniques such as rule-based pattern matching and simple memory context.

projects.title: MetroFlow
projects.description: MetroFlow is a modular Java application that calculates optimal routes in a subway network. Developed with a Test-Driven Development (TDD) approach, it ensures robust, maintainable, and reliable code through comprehensive unit tests. Ideal for urban mobility simulations, the app computes shortest or fastest paths between stations with precision.

projects.title: Smart Beverage Distribution Database System
projects.description: A robust relational database system designed for Liquide & Co to manage production, distribution, invoicing, and compliance of beverage logistics. It handles customers, suppliers, product types, geographic regions, subsidies, and enforces business rules using SQL functions, views, and triggers.

projects.title: BookShop Management System
projects.description: A C++ application to manage a bookstore's inventory, suppliers, employees, purchases, and sales. The system interacts with a MySQL database to provide complete CRUD functionality, track purchases, generate invoices, and manage memberships.

job.availability: Available immediately — actively looking for new opportunities in Data & AI
job.workStyle: Curious and pragmatic — I move fast, learn faster. Comfortable in agile teams, client-facing environments, and hands-on delivery from PoC to production. I adapt the right tool to each problem.
job.goals: I'm looking for a Data & AI engineering role where I can design and ship production-grade AI systems — LLM integrations, agentic pipelines, RAG architectures — and contribute to high-impact projects. I want to work with teams that take AI seriously and help companies turn prototypes into real, scalable products.

funFacts: Currently reading Zero to One by Peter Thiel
Fitness enthusiast — weightlifting and outdoor adventures
Passionate traveler — studied across 3 countries, now based in Paris
Love solving complex problems with simple, elegant solutions
Tech enthusiast always exploring new tools and frameworks
personality.workingStyle: I move fast, learn faster, and love tackling challenging problems
personality.motivation: Building technology that makes a real impact on people's lives

summary.en: École Denis Diderot · Hub — round-trip internships then AI career

description.fr: 3 ans à l'EIDD : hub école — chaque stage part de l'école et y revient (Créteil L1, Madrid L2, CGI L3).
description.en: 3 years at EIDD: school hub — each internship leaves from school and returns (Créteil Y1, Madrid Y2, CGI Y3).

summary.en: Year 1 · Java refactor · Back to school

description.fr: Premier stage en France pendant la 1ère année. Créteil → école.
description.en: First internship in France during year 1. Créteil → back to school.

summary.fr: 2ème année · Excel/VBA → Python/Django · Retour à l'école
summary.en: Year 2 · Excel/VBA → Python/Django · Back to school

description.fr: Stage international en 2ème année. Madrid → retour Paris pour finir le cursus.
description.en: International internship in year 2. Madrid → back to Paris to finish the degree.

summary.fr: 3ème année · IA générative · RAG · Retour diplôme
summary.en: Year 3 · Generative AI · RAG · Back to graduate

description.fr: Entrée dans l'IA chez CGI/EDF pendant la dernière année. La Défense → retour école → diplôme nov. 2024.

description.en: After graduation: launched freelance to deepen generative AI. Active micro-entrepreneur status.

description.fr: Conception d'accélérateurs IA commercialisables : Market Intelligence, AO Crawler, Eko (Hackathon).
description.en: Design of commercializable AI accelerators: Market Intelligence, AO Crawler, Eko (Hackathon).

documentLabel.fr: Grille d'évaluation officielle — rapport de stage 1A (2021-2022)
Grille d'évaluation officielle — rapport de stage 2A (2022-2023)

quote.fr: Karol a su faire preuve d'une grande curiosité sur des sujets assez complexes de l'usage de l'IA au service des métiers. J'ai particulièrement apprécié son niveau d'autonomie, son professionnalisme mais surtout sa capacité d'abstraction pour décrire et expliquer ses travaux. Encore merci pour ton travail au sein de CGI.
quote.en: Karol has demonstrated great curiosity on complex topics related to the use of AI to support business lines. I particularly appreciated his level of autonomy, his professionalism, but above all his ability to abstract and explain his work. Thank you again for your work at CGI.

quote.fr: Karol est un jeune ingénieur IA avec un bel avenir devant lui. Ce qui le distingue, c'est sa capacité à rester pragmatique face aux défis. Toujours de bonne humeur et agréable à côtoyer, il s'intègre parfaitement dans une équipe technique. C'est un atout précieux que je continuerai à suivre de près !
quote.en: Karol is a young AI engineer with a bright future ahead of him. What sets him apart is his ability to stay pragmatic when facing challenges. Always in good spirits and easy to work with, he fits perfectly into a technical team. He's a strong asset whom I'll continue to follow closely!
